sources.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Official point requires proof by mathematical induction for sums of series, divisibility and matrix powers.
No canonical node exists for induction or divisibility proofs; mapped to the nearest proof-methods node and the nodes covering the two named contexts.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Covers solving quadratic, cubic and quartic equations with real coefficients using complex roots.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Cartesian-form arithmetic and the terms real/imaginary part.
Guidance also introduces modulus and argument terminology, which is treated as assumed knowledge for later points.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Complex conjugate and the conjugate-pair theorem for polynomial roots with real coefficients.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Representation and interpretation of complex numbers on an Argand diagram.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Conversion between Cartesian and modulus-argument forms.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Multiplication and division of complex numbers in modulus-argument form.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Loci and regions in the Argand diagram, including circles, half-lines and perpendicular bisectors.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: De Moivre's theorem, multiple-angle formulae and sums of series using complex numbers.
Core Pure content; paper eligibility inferred from qualification structure.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Euler's formula, polar form and the exponential forms of sine and cosine.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: nth roots of a complex number and their regular n-gon representation.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Roots of unity and their use in geometric problems.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Matrix addition, subtraction, multiplication and scalar multiplication.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Zero and identity matrices.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Matrix representations of 2-D and 3-D linear transformations and successive transformations.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Invariant points and invariant lines for a linear transformation.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Determinants of 2x2 and 3x3 matrices as scale factors including orientation.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Singular and non-singular matrices, properties and calculation of inverses.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Solving three linear simultaneous equations using the inverse matrix.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Geometric interpretation of consistency and inconsistency of three planes.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Relations between roots and coefficients of polynomial equations up to quartic.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Forming polynomial equations whose roots are a linear transformation of given roots.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Sums of integers, squares and cubes and summing related series.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Method of differences including use of partial fractions.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Maclaurin series of a function including the general term.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Maclaurin series for standard functions and their ranges of validity.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Volumes of revolution using both Cartesian and parametric forms.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Improper integrals with infinite limits or undefined integrands.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Mean value of a function over an interval.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Integration using partial fractions including irreducible quadratic factors.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Differentiation of inverse trigonometric functions.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Integrals leading to inverse trigonometric functions and trigonometric substitutions.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Vector and Cartesian equations of straight lines in 3-D, intersections, skew and parallel lines.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Vector and Cartesian equations of a plane.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Scalar product, plane form r.n=k and angles between lines and planes.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Using the scalar product to check whether vectors are perpendicular.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Intersection of line and plane and perpendicular distances involving lines, points and planes.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Polar coordinates and conversion between polar and Cartesian coordinates.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Sketching polar curves including trigonometric forms.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Area enclosed by a polar curve and tangents parallel or perpendicular to the initial line.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Definitions, domains, ranges and graphs of sinh, cosh and tanh.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Differentiation and integration of hyperbolic functions.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Definitions, domains and ranges of inverse hyperbolic functions.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Derivation and use of logarithmic forms of inverse hyperbolic functions.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Integrals leading to inverse hyperbolic functions and hyperbolic substitutions.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Integrating factor for first-order linear differential equations.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: General and particular solutions and sketching solution curves.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Modelling with first-order differential equations in kinematics and other contexts.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Second-order homogeneous linear differential equations using the auxiliary equation.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Second-order non-homogeneous equations via complementary function and particular integral.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Link between the discriminant of the auxiliary equation and the form of solution.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Simple harmonic motion equation and its relation to the motion.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Damped oscillations and interpretation of solutions including forced vibration.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Coupled first-order linear simultaneous differential equations and modelling.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: t-formulae expressing sin, cos and tan in terms of t=tan(theta/2).

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Using t-formulae to derive trigonometric identities.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Using t-formulae to solve trigonometric equations.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Derivation and use of Taylor series.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Using series expansions to find limits.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Leibniz's theorem for differentiating products.

reviewNotes: L'Hospital's rule is not represented by a specific node in the catalog.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Weierstrass tangent half-angle substitution for integration.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Taylor series method for series solution of differential equations.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Differential equations reducible by a given substitution.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Cartesian and parametric equations of parabola, ellipse and hyperbola.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Focus-directrix properties and eccentricity of conic sections.

reviewNotes: Tangents and normals to conic sections; catalog lacks a dedicated conic tangents node.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Loci problems related to conic sections.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Vector product and its interpretation as an area.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Scalar triple product and volumes of tetrahedron and parallelepiped.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Vector applications to 3-D geometry including lines and planes.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Numerical solution of first and second order differential equations by finite differences.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Simpson's rule for numerical integration.

evidence.title: Pearson Edexcel A Level Further Mathematics 9FM0 specification

reviewNotes: Manipulation and solution of algebraic inequalities and inequations including modulus.

Formula-sheet list of trigonometric identities and triangle formulae; not a discrete statement of required technique, so mapped broadly to relevant trigonometry nodes.
Mensuration formulae including circle, prism, trapezium, arc/sector and Pythagoras; spans geometry and trigonometry nodes.
Covers multiplication/division in polar form, loci (circle and half-line) and Euler/exponential form.
2x2 determinant, inverse, order of composite transformations and inverse of a product.
Summation formula for first n natural numbers and relations between roots and coefficients of quadratic/cubic equations.
Definitions of cosh, sinh and tanh in exponential form.

syllabusPoints.sourceReference: p.68, Calculus and Differential Equations - Differentiation
reviewNotes: Standard derivatives table including powers, trigonometric, hyperbolic, exponential, logarithmic, product and chain rules.

syllabusPoints.sourceReference: p.69, Calculus and Differential Equations - Integration
reviewNotes: Standard integrals table including powers, trigonometric, hyperbolic, exponential, reciprocal and substitution forms.

syllabusPoints.sourceReference: p.69, Calculus and Differential Equations - area and volumes of revolution
reviewNotes: Formulae for area under a curve and volumes of revolution about the x- and y-axes.

syllabusPoints.sourceReference: p.69, Calculus and Differential Equations - Simple Harmonic Motion
reviewNotes: Differential equation x-double-dot = -omega^2 x for simple harmonic motion.
3D vector magnitude in i,j,k, scalar product, and vector equations of lines and planes.
Mean of a data set and standardisation of a Normal variable.

syllabusPoints.sourceReference: p.71, Mechanics - forces, equilibrium, kinematics, momentum and energy
reviewNotes: Mechanics formulae for weight, friction, Newton's second law, variable-acceleration kinematics, momentum/impulse, kinetic and potential energy.
Tension and stored energy in an elastic string (Hooke's law and elastic potential energy).
SHM equations given in the mechanics formula list, linked to the second-order differential equation node.
